OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

LOGRHYTHM_INCIDENTS_API_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of the LogRhythm API gateway (e.g. https://logrhythm.example.com:8501).

LOGRHYTHM_INCIDENTS_API_TOKEN.description: LogRhythm API token (Bearer) used for authentication.

LOGRHYTHM_INCIDENTS_MAX_CASES.description: Maximum number of LogRhythm cases to fetch per run.

LOGRHYTHM_INCIDENTS_TLP_LEVEL.description: TLP marking applied to the imported incidents.

LOGRHYTHM_INCIDENTS_SSL_VERIFY.description: Whether to verify the SSL certificate of the LogRhythm API gateway.
